description.ko: AQUA-5는 초심해저의 엄청난 수압을 견디도록 설계된 최첨단 잠수 로봇입니다. 정밀한 생물 발광 센서를 탑재하여 인류의 발길이 닿지 않은 깊은 바닷속 심연을 탐사합니다.
description.en: The AQUA-5 is a state-of-the-art submersible unit engineered to withstand the crushing pressures of the Hadal zone. Equipped with advanced bioluminescent sensors, it explores the uncharted depths of the ocean floor.

prompt: Cinematic shot of AQUA-5, a futuristic deep-sea exploration drone with bioluminescent blue lights, navigating through a dark underwater trench, glowing hydrothermal vents in the background, marine snow particles, hyper-realistic, 8k, volumetric lighting, metallic titanium textures.
